calibration_notes: My recent intraday BEARISH calls have been accurate (11/12 correct) when P/C > 1.4 and VIX > 25, validating my flow-based approach in high volatility regimes. However, I've been too conservative with confidence levels (45-55%) despite strong signal alignment. For tickers I previously missed like IWM, I'm now weighing defensive rotation signals more heavily when small-caps diverge from large-caps.
